title: Flex Ltd. (FLEX) CEO Revathi Advaithi on Q4 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Flex Ltd. (NASDAQ:FLEX ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 4, 2022 4:30 PM ET Company Participants David Rubin - Investor Relations Revathi Advaithi - Chief Executive Officer Paul Lundstrom - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Mark Delaney - Goldman Sachs Steven Fox - Fox Advisors Matt Sheerin - Stifel Ruplu Bhattacharya - Bank of America Jim Suva - Citigroup Paul Chung - JPMorgan Melissa Fairbanks - Raymond James Operator Good afternoon and thank you for standing by. Welcome to Flex Fiscal Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Flex (FLEX) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Flex (FLEX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 18.18% and 6.47%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: CDW's Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
text: Top-line expansion and higher sales in Corporate, Small Business and Other segments drive CDW Corporation's (CDW) first-quarter 2022 results.

title: Flex: Deeply Discounted Industry Leader With A Potential Spinoff Catalyst
text: EMS leader Flex's exposure to high-growth markets should ensure a strong revenue outlook through 2025. With margins also moving higher on mix benefits and cost discipline, earnings should also ramp up in the coming years.
